sub_modules.fp_unpack_classify: Extracts sign, exponent, and mantissa fields and classifies zero, infinity, and NaN operands.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Handles NaN, infinity, infinity-times-zero, and zero-result cases with the expected packed result and exception flags.
sub_modules.fp_significand_multiply: Computes result sign, unbiased exponent sum, and full-precision significand product for normal operands.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round_pack: Normalizes the significand product, applies rounding mode, packs the final floating-point result, and detects overflow or flush-to-zero underflow.
